overall.description: A first-person perspective from inside an elevated monorail train traveling through a rainy cyberpunk metropolis at night. Heavy rainfall streaks across the windows as the train passes towering glass skyscrapers and neon-lit commercial districts, creating a moody, atmospheric urban scene characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated monorail cabin passing corporate district

agents.ego_description: sitting inside the monorail train looking out at the rain-soaked cityscape through the side window

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with grid-patterned illuminated windows dominating the right side of the view
heavy rain droplets streaking diagonally across the glass window surface
metal support beams and track structure visible below the train carriage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view from inside an elevated train carriage during a heavy downpour at night. A massive corporate glass tower with grid-patterned windows passes by on the right while rain streaks heavily across the window. The train moves steadily forward through the urban canyon with support pillars visible below.

scene_state.functional_zone: monorail interior revealing cabin seating and city views

events.description: camera pans right revealing the train cabin interior with empty passenger seats and overhead lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing the train journey while the view expands to show the interior cabin space

entered.detail: rows of empty dark-colored passenger seats with headrests visible inside the train cabin
interior lighting fixtures illuminating the train cabin ceiling

segments.scene_description: As the train continues moving, the camera angle shifts to reveal the interior of the monorail cabin on the right side, showing empty passenger seats and overhead lighting fixtures. The rain continues to pour outside while the train passes through the dense urban environment, transitioning from the corporate tower view to a more open cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train passing neon commercial billboard district

events.description: train passes large illuminated commercial billboards with bright yellow and red neon signage

agents.ego_description: traveling through the commercial district with prominent neon advertisements visible through the rain-streaked windows

entered.detail: large bright yellow illuminated advertisement billboard with red imagery visible on the left side
street lamps and ground-level lighting visible through the rain below the elevated tracks

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the train moving through a neon-lit commercial area with large illuminated billboards visible on the left. The camera focuses forward through the heavy rain, passing bright yellow and red neon advertisements while street-level lights twinkle below. The train maintains its steady pace through the rainy cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from an elevated train as it travels from a sterile corporate district into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial hub during a heavy nocturnal downpour. It begins by gliding past a massive glass corporate tower with grid-patterned windows, while rain streaks heavily across the glass and support pillars blur below. As the train continues forward, the camera angle shifts inward to reveal the empty passenger seats and overhead lighting of the monorail cabin before the view opens back up to the cityscape. The scene then transitions into a dense commercial area, where the dark urban canyon gives way to large, glowing billboards in bright yellow and red. Finally, the camera focuses forward through the relentless rain, passing these illuminated advertisements as street-level lights twinkle far below.
